title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: Verify the Connected / Nearby device details screen displays device name, status, description, and Play button when accessing Find My Device with a paired headset.
steps: Start the app with headset paired and connected.
Tap on Find My Device (allow GPS location if prompted).
Tap on the Blue Geo icon.
expected: A new window displays the device name, status (Connected), a description "Make sure this device is being used as your main audio source to play tone", and a Play button.
